rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ETHEL LEE CORLEY 2001 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Petition, Memorandum In Support; And Declaration Of Philip Keith
rulings.Rulings: Tentative Ruling: Petitioner Loreen Quinn's Motion for Leave to File First Amended Petition is Granted. Petitioner must file the Amended Petition within 10 days. If any party or counsel wishes to contest the tentative ruling they must notify the Probate Department Clerk at (415) 551-3702 and all other counsel/parties by 4:00 p.m. on January 6, 2011. If there is no opposition to the tentative ruling, it will become the ruling of the court, no appearance is required, and the court will issue an order in accordance with the tentative ruling.
